label: Ritual outcome comp (quality curve)
description: Abstract intermediate comp that maps a runtime count to a quality offset via a SimpleCurve. Not used directly as a Class value; use concrete subclasses.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Fixed quality offset when this comp applies. Not used by Quality subclasses that compute offset from the curve.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping a runtime count (X) to a quality offset (Y).
